headline: SYMBOTIC INC (SYM) Down 16% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: SYMBOTIC INC (SYM) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: A Post-Iran War View on Energy Investing
summary: Once the war ends, there will still be a long period of adjustment as countries rebuild stockpiles and Middle East producers restore lost production.
